concerns.text: FR-003 cites algorithm sources with unresolved placeholders: 'arXiv math/[identifier]' and '-bridge knot'. These must be resolved to specific IDs (e.g., arXiv:math/0303273) or stable URLs before implementation to satisfy Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy).
